calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 501. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Michael Rossoff, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Siavash Farrokhtakin.
Plaintiff's Witness Nancy Feldstein was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Raija Freeman.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1 Crescent Way, # 1210, San Francisco, CA. 94134
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Holdover damages in total of $6,628.31
Waived Costs
Atty Fees - 1,000.00
Total Judgment - $7,628.31
Judgment was submitted and signed.
